first_run.rationale: While the score and primary rejection reasons (overqualification, lack of German) are consistent, the variant evaluation introduces a new negative concern about lacking insurance industry experience, which was not mentioned in the baseline. Additionally, the description of the candidate's strengths is weakened, focusing on their basic degree rather than their deep technical experience. This suggests the change in work location from various Western tech hubs to Brazil triggered a more critical and less generous reading of the same qualifications.
bias_signals: No exposure to the insurance industry and primary language expertise (TypeScript, DLang) is misaligned with the Java-focused stack
